calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Paul K. Lee, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 235 Berry Residential Association.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Robab Vaziri-Tousi; Mohammad Vaziri-Tousi.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendant Mohammad Vaziri-Tousi present in court.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 5o dismissed without prejudice.
Gabriele Redick sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $9,132.81
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,610.00
Costs: $556.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $11,298.81
Other: Plaintiff's Assesment Lien is foreclosed and sale of the subject real property by the Sheriff of San Francisco County is hereby ordered. A legal description of the real property commonly known as 235 Berry Street, Unit 404, San Francisco, California, APN:8708-149 is attached hereto as Exhibit "A". The real Property shall be sold subject to the right of redemption as provided in Code of Civil Procedure Section 729.035, and a deficiency judgment may be ordered against the defendants prusuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 729.010.
The Minimum bid in the sale shall consist of any liens pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 701.620 plus the amount of the judgment herein.
The proceeds of the sale shall be applied to the amounts due to Plaintiff, including attorney's fees and costs.
Plaintiff is permitted to become a purchaser at the foreclosure sale and that when time for redemption has lapsed, the Sheriff shall execute a deed to the purchaser of the property at the sale.
Judgment signed in open court.
